title: Podman cannot fetch secrets created with the pass driver
body:
### Issue Description

Inspecting pass driver secrets with the `--showsecret` option or trying to use them with a container fails with a secret not found error.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

```
~ ⌚ 8:17:11
$ echo youreyesonly | podman secret create topsecret --driver=pass --replace -
b0e5123397f541a5e090e29b1

~ ⌚ 8:17:24
$ podman secret inspect topsecret
[
    {
        "ID": "b0e5123397f541a5e090e29b1",
        "CreatedAt": "2026-06-16T08:17:24.491784524+03:00",
        "UpdatedAt": "2026-06-16T08:17:24.491784524+03:00",
        "Spec": {
            "Name": "topsecret",
            "Driver": {
                "Name": "pass",
                "Options": {}
            },
            "Labels": {}
        }
    }
]

~ ⌚ 8:17:29
$ podman secret inspect topsecret --showsecret
[]
Error: inspecting secret: b0e5123397f541a5e090e29b1: no such secret

~ ⌚ 8:17:32
$ pass b0e5123397f541a5e090e29b1
youreyesonly
```

### Describe the results you received

Got an error claiming no such secret.

### Describe the results you expected

Expected to get the secret I just created.
